title: strumvg Configuration
description:
Configurable properties for customizing the SVG output of `strumvg`.
Size-related properties are either an SVG user unit measurement or a ratio relative to another concrete property.

colors.title: Color styling properties
colors.description:
Styling related to colors.
Color values can be any string recognized by [SVG/CSS as a color](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/Values/color_value).

rhythms.description: The color of the rhythm text and stems below the arrows.

headers.description: The color of the articulations and header text above the arrows.

barlines.description: The color of the articulations and header text above the arrows.

textSizes.title: Text sizing properties
textSizes.description:
Styling related to text sizes.
Properties denoted as a "height" refer to the amount of vertical space (in SVG user units) that will be reserved for that text.
Properties denoted as a "font size" will translate to the `font-size` attribute.

beatTextHeight.description: The height of the space reserved for rhythm text below the arrows.

beatFontSizeRatio.description: The relative font-size of the rhythm text below the arrows, as a fraction of its height.

headerTextHeight.description: The height of the space reserved for articulations and header text above the arrows.

headerFontSizeRatio.description: The relative font-size of the articulations and header text above the arrows, as a fraction of its height.

tripletFontSize.description: The actual font-size of the triplet label, if applicable.

width.description:
The width of the space reserved for each strum arrow.
This is the width of the space reserved for each "rhythmic column" composed of arrow, header text, and beat text. It also defines the maximum width of a strum's arrowhead.

height.description: The height of each strum arrow.

strokeWidthRatio.description: The relative stroke width of a strum arrow's lines, as a fraction of `width`.

gap.description: The horizontal space between each strum.

strokeWidth.description: The stroke width of the rhythm stems/beams below the arrows.

stemHeight.description: The vertical length of the beam stems.

strokeWidth.description: The stroke width of the barlines.

heightRatio.description: The relative height of a barline, as a fraction of `strumSizes.height`.

gapRatio.description: The relative width of a gap between a barline and adjacent "rhythmic columns", as a fraction of `strumSizes/gap`.

arrowText.description: Font styling for text inserted in place of arrows.

countChar.description: Font styling for rhythm count text.

tripletText.description: Font styling for triplet labels ("3"), if applicable.

family.title: Font family name.
family.description: Values can be any string recognized by [SVG/CSS as a font family](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/Properties/font-family).

weight.title: Font weight.
weight.description: Values can be any string recognized by [SVG/CSS as a font weight](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/Properties/font-weight).

style.title: Font style.
style.description: Values can be any string recognized by [SVG/CSS as a font style](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/Properties/font-style).
